LanguageData.CorsairBroadside.label: broadside overdrive
LanguageData.CorsairBroadside.description:
Force your combat rhythm into a short broadside burst. Fire faster and aim quicker, but incoming fire becomes harder to shrug off.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.CorsairPlunderMark.label: plunder mark
LanguageData.CorsairPlunderMark.description:
Tag a target as ripe salvage, slowing their movement and making them easier to finish.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.CorsairCutthroatRush.label: cutthroat rush
LanguageData.CorsairCutthroatRush.description:
Commit to a savage boarding sprint. You gain brutal close-range momentum at the cost of higher exposure.
created/edited by easyrim
